system.flavor: With prayer, a gentle healing rain begins falling on your allies.
system.effect:
Effect an ally in range. That ally gains aura 1. At the end of that ally's turn, grant 2 vigor to yourself and all allies in the aura, including your marked ally (3+) and create difficult terrain under all foes in the aura (5+) and yourself and allies in the aura can remove one negative status token.
Effect the marked ally is bloodied, this gains effect [+]. If that ally is in crisis, increase aura size by +1.
